ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skins" (
  "skin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skin */,
  "goods_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the goods ID on the marketplace */,
  "market_hash_name" TEXT /* Market hash name of the skin */,
  "paintseed" INTEGER /* Paintseed of the skin */,
  "wear_level" REAL /* Wear level of the skin */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the skin */,
  "exterior" TEXT /* Exterior quality of the skin */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the skin's image */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the skin belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skin data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skin data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketplaces" (
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketplace */,
  "marketplace_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketplace */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the marketplace */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint of the marketplace */,
  "marketplace_type" TEXT /* Type of marketplace */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the marketplace */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marketplace data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marketplace data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketplace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "skin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skin being listed */,
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketplace where the skin is listed */,
  "price_rmb" REAL /* Price of the skin in RMB */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the skin in USD */,
  "time_checked" TEXT /* Time when the listing was last checked */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the listing */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller who listed the skin */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who purchased the skin */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the listing data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the listing data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_skin_id FOREIGN KEY ("skin_id") REFERENCES skins ("skin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_marketplace_id FOREIGN KEY ("marketplace_id") REFERENCES marketplaces ("marketplace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stickers" (
  "sticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sticker */,
  "sticker_name" TEXT /* Name of the sticker */,
  "sticker_price" REAL /* Price of the sticker */,
  "sticker_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the sticker */,
  "sticker_type" TEXT /* Type of sticker */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the sticker's image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sticker data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sticker data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skin_stickers" (
  "skin_sticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skin-sticker association */,
  "skin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skin */,
  "sticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sticker */,
  "stickers_count" INTEGER /* Number of stickers applied to the skin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skin-sticker association data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skin-sticker association data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skin_sticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skin_stickers_sticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("sticker_id") REFERENCES stickers ("sticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skin_stickers_skin_id FOREIGN KEY ("skin_id") REFERENCES skins ("skin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "time_sent" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_warehouse" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "skin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skin */,
  "marketplace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketplace */,
  "price_rmb" REAL /* Price of the skin in RMB */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the skin in USD */,
  "time_checked" TEXT /* Time when the data point was recorded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_warehouse_marketplace_id FOREIGN KEY ("marketplace_id") REFERENCES marketplaces ("marketplace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_warehouse_skin_id FOREIGN KEY ("skin_id") REFERENCES skins ("skin_id")
)
